instances.docker_build_hint: base: python:3.11-slim-bookworm + git build-essential curl; env image should be grouped by repo_version=py311-pandas-v1; instance image should default to pandas__001; env: upgrade pip/setuptools/wheel, install requirements-dev.txt if present, then pip install -e .; instance: container name codex-pandas__001, repo root /workspace/repo, run variants in clean copies/worktrees.
instances.install_or_bootstrap_hint: python -m pip install -U pip setuptools wheel && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install -e .
